metadata.description: Primitive ID to Python mapping (runtime version)

1809.name: Index Array
1809.guess_reason: Expandable indexing - can return multiple elements

1516.name: Array Subset
1516.guess_reason: 3in: array, start, length -> subset. Heavily used in 'Slice 1D Array' VIs
1516.python_code: subarray = array[index:None if length is None else index + length]

1118.name: Decrement
1118.guess_reason: 1in/1out numeric. Used in Slice VIs for index calculation

1112.name: Not A Path?
1112.guess_reason: Checks if path is empty/invalid. Returns True if path is empty or not set.

1051.name: Concatenate Strings
1051.guess_reason: Polymorphic - works on strings and arrays

8003.name: Open/Create/Replace File
8003.guess_reason: 8xxx are often compound nodes. Multiple file-related I/O

1166.name: String Subset
1166.guess_reason: Used in 'Get Last PString', substring ops

1145.name: To More Specific Class
1145.python_code: output = input  # downcast (type check in Python via isinstance)

1083.name: Not A Path?
1083.guess_reason: No inputs, single output - returns app dir. Used in Provider_Startup

1102.name: Equal?
1102.guess_reason: Two inputs, one output - comparison operation

1056.name: Split Array
1056.guess_reason: 1 array in, 2 arrays out - splitting (from OpenG)

1052.name: Variant To Data
1052.guess_reason: Used in 'Array to Set', variant operations

8011.name: Write To Text File
8011.guess_reason: Very common (25 uses). File + data inputs

1062.name: Decimate Array
1062.guess_reason: Used in GIF reader for frame extraction (from OpenG)

1502.name: String Length
1502.guess_reason: Numeric to string conversion in Get Platform Path Separator

1064.name: String To Path
1064.guess_reason: Inverse of Path To String, used when creating paths from user input

8082.name: File/Directory Info
8082.guess_reason: Returns file/directory metadata including size, timestamps, type info. idx=11 is path input, idx=3 is path passthrough output.

python_code._body: _stat = Path(path).stat() if (path and Path(path).exists()) else None

1128.name: Refnum To Path
1128.guess_reason: Converts refnum to path. If input is already a path, passes through.

1510.name: Quotient & Remainder
1510.guess_reason: Used in 'Number to Proper Engl Text'

1423.name: Search/Split String
1423.guess_reason: Used in Get Platform Path Separator, splits on pattern

1911.name: Array Length
1911.guess_reason: Array input, numeric output - similar to 1189

3914.name: Format/Scan String (multi)
3914.guess_reason: Used in 'Encode Section and Key Names'

8076.name: Check If File or Folder Exists
8076.guess_reason: File/folder existence check - alternate connector pane with all inputs

1103.name: Greater Or Equal?
1103.guess_reason: Comparison in 'Number to Proper Engl Text'

1340.name: Unbundle
1340.guess_reason: One input (cluster/class), multiple outputs (fields) - extracts fields in index order. Expandable to any number of outputs.
1340.python_code: list(cluster.values()) if hasattr(cluster, 'values') else (list(vars(cluster).values()) if hasattr(cluster, '__dict__') else list(cluster))
1340.note: Polymorphic: dict.values() for clusters, vars(obj).values() for class instances, list() for tuples

1302.name: Bundle
1302.guess_reason: Creates cluster/tuple from multiple inputs. Expandable.
1302.note: Bundles inputs into a tuple. Code generator expands for actual terminal count.

1077.name: Path Type
1077.guess_reason: Single input path, single output - likely returns path type info

1426.name: Empty Path Constant
1426.guess_reason: No inputs, path output - empty or default path

1078.name: Path To String
1078.guess_reason: Used in 'VITester Toolbar Icon Paths', path->string conversion common

1341.name: Bundle By Name
1341.guess_reason: Updates specific field in cluster. Input cluster + new value = output cluster with updated field.
1341.note: Merges new field value into existing cluster/dict. Actual field name comes from VI context.

8055.name: Create Folder
8055.guess_reason: Creates folder. idx=7 OR idx=11 can be path input (connector pane variant).

1303.name: Empty String Constant
1303.guess_reason: No inputs, string output - likely empty string

2075.name: Merge Errors
2075.guess_reason: Combines errors - first error wins. In held error model: first non-None error propagates.

python_code.error_out: error_in__no_error_ if (isinstance(error_in__no_error_, dict) and error_in__no_error_.get('status')) else error_in_2__no_error_

2076.name: Clear Error
2076.guess_reason: Clears error cluster. In held error model: _held_error = None

9114.name: To More Specific Class
9114.python_code: output = input  # downcast (type check in Python via isinstance)
